message.content:
@startuml
title Create User Profile

actor "User" as user1 at top left
participant "API Gateway" as api_gateway_top
participant "Auth-Service" as auth_service_top
participant "User-Service" as user_service_top

activate user1
user1 ->> api_gateway_top : POST /api/users\n
deactivate user1

activate api_gateway_top
api_gateway_top ->> auth_service_top : check authorization\n
activate auth_service_top
auth_service_top --> api_gateway_top : http_status: 200\n
deactivate auth_service_top

api_gateway_top ->> user_service_top : POST /api/users\n
activate user_service_top
user_service_top --> api_gateway_top : http_status: 200\n
deactivate user_service_top

api_gateway_top -->> user1 : profile created..\n
deactivate api_gateway_top


' Bottom actors for visual completeness matching source layout
actor "User" as user_bottom bottom right
rectangle "" { } ' Placeholder to push elements down if needed visually in some renderers, though standard sequence handles spacing. 
note over user_bottom #DDDDDD;hidden note:end_note 

@enduml
